'''''Gauntlet''''', later renamed '''''Corusca Fire''''', was a [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] in the service of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. It participated in the [[Battle of Ciutric]] under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]], and later in the [[Battle of Dantooine (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Dantooine]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Rimsen]].

==History==
===Second Battle of Ciutric===
Having received a signal from [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]], the ''Corusca Fire'' performed the [[Thrawn Pincer]], reverting into real space behind enemy lines, along with the ''[[Selonian Fire]]'', another New Republic ''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer. With their combined firepower, the two Star Destroyers managed to destroy [[Delak Krennel]]'s [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Reckoning (Imperial II-class)|''Reckoning'']], killing Krennel in the process.

===Battle of Dantooine===
During the Battle of Dantooine, the ''Corusca Fire'', along with the [[Bothan Assault Cruiser]] ''[[Ralroost]]'', managed to fend off a Yuuzhan Vong cruiser long enough to allow for the evacuation of the remaining soldiers on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]].

==Behind the scenes==
''Gauntlet'' is one of several names in the class-specific lists from which the video games ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' and its expansion [[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption|''Forces of Corruption'']] randomly select names for capital ships. The existence of the name in this list indicates such a ship existed in the Imperial Navy at that time, but no other information is canonically available.
